flows.name: B2B User Acquisition
steps: Organic/Paid entry to specific ServiceLandingPage via SEO-optimized semantic core
High-performance First Contentful Paint with GSAP premium entry animation
Psychological anchoring via competitor-superior B2B value proposition
Interactive exploration of cases and dynamic pricing calculator
Conversion via frictionless, 152-FZ compliant analytics-tracked form

dark_matter: Content mapping for 12+ individual service landing pages
Specific GSAP timelines for each service archetype (e.g., neon vs volumetric letters)
Integration points for server-side telemetry without impacting Core Web Vitals
